title: Aliquotting PCR Primer Mixture
author: Kenneth Schackart

steps_raw.instruction: Add the volume of nuclease-free water to each tube according to the documentation provided by the primer. In the case of E. coli K12, the following volumes are to be used: %s %s
Use the following table to make 25 μM, 100 μL stocks: %s %s
Store all primer mixtures in freezer for up to 2 years
Aliquot the primer mixture into quantities that can be expected to be used in one day to avoid freeze/thaw cycling.
